note: First 5 commercial verticals for the Dealix Commercial Launch OS. Machine-readable backbone for the daily draft factory. Human playbooks live in docs/commercial-launch/01_FIRST_5_VERTICALS.md.

verticals.icp_en: FM and maintenance operators (200+ assets / multi-site) running reactive work orders across WhatsApp, Excel and ageing CAFM, with SLA penalties and revenue leaking through unbilled or mis-scoped jobs.
verticals.icp_ar: شركات إدارة المرافق والصيانة (200+ أصل أو مواقع متعددة) تدير أوامر العمل بشكل تفاعلي عبر واتساب وإكسل وأنظمة CAFM قديمة، مع غرامات SLA وتسرب إيراد بسبب أعمال غير مفوترة أو سوء تحديد النطاق.
pains: SLA breaches and penalties from missed or untracked work orders
Unbilled or under-scoped jobs leaking margin every month
Reactive scheduling with no single source of truth across sites
Manual handoffs between WhatsApp, Excel and CAFM
No evidence trail when a client disputes completion
verticals.offer_angle_en: Govern the work-order-to-invoice workflow so SLA risk and unbilled jobs surface before they cost you.
verticals.offer_angle_ar: حوكمة مسار أمر العمل حتى الفاتورة بحيث تظهر مخاطر SLA والأعمال غير المفوترة قبل أن تكلفك.
verticals.proof_asset: Work-order leakage map: a sample audit of 30 anonymized work orders showing SLA risk and unbilled value, with the top 3 governed fixes.
messaging_angles_en: Where SLA penalties are quietly accruing across sites
How many work orders close without a billable record
The 3 handoffs where completion evidence disappears
messaging_angles_ar: أين تتراكم غرامات SLA بهدوء عبر المواقع
كم أمر عمل يُغلق دون سجل قابل للفوترة
أين تختفي أدلة الإنجاز في 3 نقاط تسليم
objections: We already have a CAFM system
Our team is too busy to change anything now
Data is sensitive and lives with the client
disqualification_rules: No SLAs and no recurring contracts
Pure hardware reseller with no service ops
verticals.compliance_notes: Never claim access to their CAFM or client data. Frame the audit as founder-reviewed and evidence-first on data they choose to share.
verticals.delivery_promise: A founder-reviewed leakage map within 7 business days of receiving a redacted work-order sample. No system access required.

verticals.icp_en: Mid-size contractors and project-controls teams managing multiple concurrent projects where variation orders, progress claims and subcontractor payments slip through manual approvals.
verticals.icp_ar: شركات مقاولات متوسطة وفِرق ضبط مشاريع تدير عدة مشاريع متزامنة حيث تتسرب أوامر التغيير والمستخلصات ومدفوعات مقاولي الباطن عبر اعتمادات يدوية.
pains: Variation orders approved late or lost, eroding claimable value
Progress claims delayed by manual evidence gathering
No governed approval trail when disputes go to arbitration
Subcontractor payment certificates reconciled by hand
Cash flow surprises from slow claim cycles
verticals.offer_angle_en: Make the variation-to-claim approval chain evidenced and governed so claimable value is not lost to slow paperwork.
verticals.offer_angle_ar: اجعل سلسلة اعتماد أمر التغيير حتى المستخلص موثّقة ومحوكمة حتى لا تُفقد القيمة القابلة للمطالبة بسبب بطء الأوراق.
verticals.proof_asset: Variation-order governance map: a redacted review of one project's variations showing approval gaps and at-risk claimable value.
messaging_angles_en: Variation value at risk because approvals lag the work
How long a progress claim waits on manual evidence
The approval steps with no audit trail for arbitration
messaging_angles_ar: قيمة أوامر التغيير المعرّضة للخطر لأن الاعتماد متأخر عن التنفيذ
خطوات الاعتماد بلا سجل تدقيق للتحكيم
objections: Our QS team handles this manually fine
qualification_rules: Uses variation orders and progress claims
disqualification_rules: Pure labor-supply with no project controls
verticals.compliance_notes: Do not claim to access project ERP or contracts. Position as a governance map on a redacted sample the contractor chooses to share.
verticals.delivery_promise: A founder-reviewed variation-governance map within 7 business days of a redacted project sample. Read-only, no ERP access.

verticals.icp_en: Property and owners-association managers running leasing, collections and unit operations across portfolios where renewals, arrears and maintenance requests are tracked in spreadsheets.
verticals.icp_ar: مدراء العقارات واتحادات الملاك الذين يديرون التأجير والتحصيل وتشغيل الوحدات عبر محافظ حيث تُتابع التجديدات والمتأخرات وطلبات الصيانة في جداول بيانات.
pains: Renewals missed because no one owns the timeline
Arrears ageing with no governed follow-up cadence
Maintenance requests lost between tenant, manager and vendor
No single view of occupancy, collections and SLA
Owner reporting assembled manually each month
verticals.offer_angle_en: Govern the renewal, collection and maintenance cadence so occupancy and cash collection stop depending on memory.
verticals.offer_angle_ar: حوكمة دورة التجديد والتحصيل والصيانة حتى لا يعتمد الإشغال والتحصيل على الذاكرة.
verticals.proof_asset: Collections & renewal cadence map: a redacted review of one portfolio showing at-risk renewals and arrears with a governed follow-up plan.
messaging_angles_en: Renewals at risk because no one owns the date
Arrears ageing past the point of easy recovery
Maintenance requests with no closed-loop evidence
messaging_angles_ar: تجديدات معرّضة للخطر لأن لا أحد يملك التاريخ
متأخرات تتقادم بعد نقطة التحصيل السهل
objections: We have a property management system
qualification_rules: Manages a portfolio of units (not a single property)
verticals.compliance_notes: Never reference specific tenants or personal data. Use redacted, aggregate samples only. Respect tenant privacy in all messaging.
verticals.delivery_promise: A founder-reviewed cadence map within 7 business days of a redacted portfolio sample. No PMS access required.

verticals.icp_en: Law firms and professional-services practices where matter intake, conflict checks, billing and document turnaround depend on senior time and manual tracking.
verticals.icp_ar: مكاتب المحاماة وشركات الخدمات المهنية حيث يعتمد استقبال القضايا وفحوص تعارض المصالح والفوترة وإنجاز المستندات على وقت الكبار والمتابعة اليدوية.
pains: Matter intake and conflict checks bottlenecked on partners
Billable time lost to manual tracking and write-offs
Document turnaround slowed by repetitive drafting
No governed audit trail for client confidentiality
Inconsistent engagement and onboarding quality
verticals.offer_angle_en: Govern intake, conflicts and billing workflows with a privacy-first, audit-ready approach so partner time goes to clients, not admin.
verticals.offer_angle_ar: حوكمة استقبال القضايا وتعارض المصالح والفوترة بنهج يحترم الخصوصية وجاهز للتدقيق حتى يذهب وقت الشريك للعملاء لا للإدارة.
verticals.proof_asset: Intake-to-billing governance map: a privacy-first review of a redacted intake/billing sample showing bottlenecks and an audit-ready fix plan.
messaging_angles_en: Partner hours lost to intake and conflict admin
Billable time written off through manual tracking
Confidentiality with no governed audit trail
messaging_angles_ar: ساعات الشركاء المهدورة في استقبال القضايا وتعارض المصالح
وقت قابل للفوترة يُشطب بسبب المتابعة اليدوية
objections: We don't trust AI with legal data
Our partners won't change how they work
qualification_rules: Named managing partner or practice manager
disqualification_rules: Solo practitioner with no ops need
verticals.compliance_notes: Lead with privacy-first language. Never request or imply access to privileged client data. Emphasize founder review, redaction and no data retention beyond the engagement.
verticals.delivery_promise: A founder-reviewed, privacy-first governance map within 7 business days of a redacted, non-privileged sample. No access to client matters.

verticals.icp_en: Consulting, training and B2B service firms where proposals, project delivery and recurring client reporting are assembled manually, capping how many engagements the team can run.
verticals.icp_ar: شركات الاستشارات والتدريب وخدمات B2B حيث تُجمّع العروض وتسليم المشاريع وتقارير العملاء المتكررة يدويًا، مما يحدّ من عدد الارتباطات التي يستطيع الفريق إدارتها.
pains: Proposals take days of senior time to assemble
Delivery quality depends on a few key people
Client reporting rebuilt from scratch every cycle
No governed view of pipeline, delivery and renewals
Growth capped by manual operations
verticals.offer_angle_en: Govern proposals, delivery and client reporting so the firm can take on more engagements without losing quality or evidence.
verticals.offer_angle_ar: حوكمة العروض والتسليم وتقارير العملاء حتى تتمكن الشركة من قبول ارتباطات أكثر دون فقدان الجودة أو الدليل.
verticals.proof_asset: Delivery operations map: a redacted review of one engagement's proposal-to-report flow showing the manual steps capping capacity.
messaging_angles_en: Senior hours lost to assembling proposals by hand
Delivery that breaks when a key person is unavailable
Client reports rebuilt from zero every cycle
messaging_angles_ar: ساعات الكبار المهدورة في تجهيز العروض يدويًا
تسليم ينهار عند غياب شخص أساسي
تقارير عملاء تُعاد من الصفر كل دورة
objections: Our work is too bespoke to systematize
Clients pay for our people, not tools
We tried automation and it didn't fit
qualification_rules: Named MD or head of delivery
verticals.compliance_notes: Avoid over-claiming outcomes. Frame as governance and capacity, not guaranteed revenue. Use redacted samples only.
verticals.delivery_promise: A founder-reviewed delivery operations map within 7 business days of a redacted engagement sample. No system access required.
